_comment: Committed build input for site/_gen.py. The site builds without disc data, so these cannot be computed at deploy time. Refresh locally with scripts/ci/update-progress-metrics.py and commit.

tracks.label: Decompilation
tracks.headline: 84.0% of SCUS_942.54's code
tracks.detail: Share of the main executable's code bytes that sit inside a Ghidra-dumped function. Overlay images are excluded - they alias in address space, so address attribution alone cannot support a figure.

tracks.label: Asset formats
tracks.headline: 87.8% of PROT.DAT
tracks.detail: Share of disc asset bytes whose container resolves to a documented format. This is format *recognition*, not a byte-for-byte parse, so read it as an upper bound. 2.8% remains unexplained.

tracks.label: Engine port
tracks.headline: 744 functions ported
tracks.detail: Of the retail functions identified as port sites, the share carrying a clean-room Rust implementation. 45 remain on the worklist. Measured against what the project has identified, not against the whole game.

tracks.label: Port wiring
tracks.headline: 502 of 744 ported functions reachable
tracks.detail: A ported function still needs a host that calls it. This is the share reachable from a real entry point; the remaining 242 are implemented but not yet hosted, and each one says so in its source.
